arts.ttl: Feyenoord shock Bayern in comprehensive win
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's hopes of qualifying directly to the Champions League last 16 are dealt a blow as they are stunned by Feyenoord in Rotterdam.

arts.ttl: Bayern stunned by Feyenoord, facing playoff round
arts.sum: Feyenoord striker Santiago Gimenez scored twice in the first half to steer the hosts to a 3-0 victory over Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday and boost their chances of a top-eight finish on the last matchday next week.

arts.ttl: Champions League: Feyenoord secure a spot in the next round with win over Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Feyenoord sealed a massive 3-0 win over Bayern Munich in the Champions League to seal progress to the next round. Brian Priske had a midfield crisis going into the game which meant Thomas Beelen started alongside Antoni Milambo and Calvin Stengs in the middle. In the 20th minute, De Kuip exploded when Gijs Smal passed […] The post Champions League: Feyenoord secure a spot in the next round with win over Bayern Munich appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord Stun Bayern: Gimenez and Bijlow Shine in Memorable Night at De Kuip
arts.sum: Bayern München fell to defeat on the road in the Champions League for the fourth time this campaign, falling to a 3-0 defeat at the hands of Dutch giants Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Leroy Sané really wants to stay at Bayern Munich, even with prospect of a salary cut
arts.sum: Despite not exactly always being a first choice winger for Kompany, knowing full well that Michael Olise has become one of the bonafide starters in that position, Sané still wants to stay at Bayern and fight for his place in the team. Currently, Sané earns roughly 15 million euros per year, which ranks within the top seven earners at the club as of this season, but it is unclear just how much of a salary cut he is willing to take to stay at the club.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Feyenoord vs Bayern München
arts.sum: As Bayern München look to jump into the top eight, they travel to Rotterdam to face Feyenoord, the lineups for tonights clash at De Kuip have been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala on his Bayern Munich future and Davies and Sané’s contract extensions
arts.sum: The largest criticism is that Musiala and Davies are colluding to tie themselves together, essentially putting Bayern in a situation where they have to overpay both individuals to ensure they both stay in Munich. Jamal Musiala is currently working with Bayern Munich on a crucial contract extension to stay at the club long-term.

arts.ttl: Man City, Barcelona show 'concrete interest' in Joshua Kimmich as Liverpool make transfer decision over Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: Manchester City and Barcelona are reportedly showing 'concrete interest' in Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich as Liverpool make a decision over a potential move.

arts.ttl: Amid certainty, Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer and Konrad Laimer root for Leon Goretzka
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer on whether he believes Leon Goretzka still has a future at Bayern: "If he continues to play like this, of course nothing speaks against that" [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/yS6EdlFe3B Bayern Munich midfield dynamo, Leon Goretzka delivered a fabulous performance in the weekend against VfL Wolfsburg.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag is NOT in contention for Borussia Dortmund job after Nuri Sahin's sacking - as former Bayern Munich boss emerges as front-runner
arts.sum: Sahin was sacked after just seven months in charge following Dortmund's 2-1 Champions League defeat at Bologna on Tuesday night.
